item.title: Negotiate Your Worth 💰 • Research salary benchmarks in your field. • Highlight unique skills or achievements. • Use: “I increased sales by 20% in my last role.” • Practice your pitch to boost confidence. • Be prepared to discuss benefits, not just salary. What strategies have you used to effectively negotiate a higher salary? #negotiation #careeradvice #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Negotiate Your Worth 💰 • Research salary benchmarks in your field. • Highlight unique skills or achievements. • Use: “I increased sales by 20% in my last role.” • Practice your pitch to boost confidence. • Be prepared to discuss benefits, not just salary. What strategies have you used to effectively negotiate a higher salary? #negotiation #careeradvice #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
